elements.text: The platform converts unstructured healthcare documents into grounded answers, reusable rules, structured features, and explainable recommendations. The design intentionally keeps humans in the loop for high-stakes interpretation and decision review.

The design intentionally keeps humans in the loop for high-stakes interpretation and decision review.
